policy.raw_snapshots: Build inputs are local cache and are not redistributed in this repository artifact.
policy.normalized_records: Only factual identifiers, names, globs, signatures metadata, and classifications needed for indexing are emitted. Long descriptive text is not copied.
policy.provenance: Every normalized record retains source and snapshot locator. Source-specific terms and licenses continue to apply.

sources.version: registry snapshot retrieved 2026-07-19; registry page updated 2026-07-15
sources.caveat: A media type is a content label and may denote a family, encoding, protocol object, or file format.

sources.role: Format/version identifiers, extensions, internal signatures, and signature priority
sources.caveat: The signature file is an identification subset of the full PRONOM registry.

sources.role: Format families, genres, structural properties, signifiers, relations, and sustainability context
sources.caveat: Coverage is curated for preservation and is not intended to enumerate every format.

sources.role: Operational MIME aliases, extensions/globs, magic rules, XML roots, and subclass relations
sources.caveat: Project detection rules are practical heuristics, not standards registration.

sources.role: Desktop MIME aliases, globs, weighted magic, subclass and tree-magic rules
sources.caveat: Glob and magic behavior follows the shared-mime-info specification and may conflict with other detectors.

sources.role: Programming, markup, data, prose languages, filenames, and extensions
sources.caveat: A programming language entry may describe many source-file forms rather than one binary format.
